title: Bank statement transaction row
description: Tier-2 I/O contract for one transaction row produced by the extract_transactions tool. Mirrors TRANSACTION_ROW_SCHEMA in apps/desktop/src/main/services/skills/tools/bank-statement.ts and is pinned to it by tests/unit/skills-transaction-schema-parity.test.ts, so this packaged copy cannot drift from the shipped shape.

date.description: Booking date as printed on the statement, ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD).

valueDate.description: Value date, if the statement prints one separately (ISO 8601).

description.description: The transaction description exactly as printed.

amount.description: Signed amount: negative for debits/withdrawals, positive for credits/deposits.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code as printed (e.g. EUR, USD).

balanceAfter.description: Running balance after this transaction, only if the statement prints it on the row.

sourcePage.description: 1-based page of the statement the row appears on (provenance for quoting).

category.description: Persisted category name assigned by a categorize run (a label, not a figure). Never produced by the extractor.
